productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Lavender & White Striped Linen Tailored Fit Smart Casual Shirt
description: Lavender and white striped woven smart casual shirt, has a spread collar, a full button placket on the front, long sleeves with button cuffs, patch pocket with embroidered branding on the left side of the chest, yoke on the back with loop detail and box pleat below, curved hem with an overlay on either side
